nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner in ad creation
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous ad creator without human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to collaborate with AI and correct it when it provides an ad creative which may be against any rules

nodes.label: AI for data analysis and performance comparison
nodes.label_negative: Human-only data analysis without AI assistance
nodes.grounding_span: it is used to analyse data on the performance of the ads it comes up with, and how they compare to ads created in-house

nodes.label: AI for menial daily tasks (data collection)
nodes.label_negative: Human handling of menial daily tasks for accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: Things like daily menial tasks like collecting the previous days ad spend and revenue from various sources I handle myself

nodes.label: AI compliance with industry regulations
nodes.grounding_span: Most industries have rules and regulations which means ads can't cross certain boundaries

nodes.label: AI as complementary tool enhancing human expertise
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human skills
nodes.grounding_span: I do not consider AI 'taking over', as I view it more complementary to skills and more of a collaboration

nodes.label: Data-driven decision making
nodes.grounding_span: the data is all that matters, we'll test every ad that we come up with and every ad that AI comes up with

nodes.label: Regulatory compliance and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: there is a line that cannot be crossed, or certain things we cannot say

nodes.label: Professional expertise and skill retention
nodes.grounding_span: I have been in marketing/advertising for around 15+ years now, and have a good understanding of how companies work

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI's performance validation
nodes.grounding_span: AI outperformed human ads by a few percent but it showed the power of AI

nodes.label: Openness to AI collaboration despite personal preference
nodes.grounding_span: I do enjoy creating ads, however enjoyment doesn't factor into it as if data shows one ad works better than another, then we keep the winning ad

nodes.label: Preference for human handling of sensitive financial data
nodes.grounding_span: as these figures pass through to our accounting/bookkeeping team, we prefer it to be handled by humans

nodes.label: Data-driven empirical validation — testing all ads regardless of subjective opinion
nodes.grounding_span: we'll test every ad that we come up with and every ad that AI comes up with

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — correcting AI outputs based on domain knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to collaborate with AI and correct it when it provides an ad creative which may be against any rules
